---
title: "Ejemplos"
author: "Hugo Missael González Cruz"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Bank notes

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(factoextra)

data(banknote, package = "mclust")
swissTib <- as_tibble(banknote)

head(swissTib)

pca <- select(swissTib, -Status) %>%
  prcomp(center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)

fpca <- get_pca(pca)

fviz_screeplot(pca, choice="variance", addlabels=TRUE)

swissPca <- swissTib %>%
  mutate(PCA1 = pca$x[, 1], PCA2 = pca$x[, 2])

ggplot(swissPca, aes(PCA1, PCA2, col = Status)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw()
```

# Agregar nuevos datos
```{r}
newBanknotes <- tibble(
  Length = c(214, 216),
  Left = c(130, 128),
  Right = c(132, 129),
  Bottom = c(12, 7),
  Top = c(12, 8),
  Diagonal = c(138, 142)
)
predict(pca, newBanknotes)
```
